description: Yahoo! JAPAN is a Japanese internet service platform operated by LY Corporation, with consumer services including shopping, maps, news, identity, and advertising. Its developer properties provide APIs for those products, especially shopping, mapping/text analysis, and ad account management.
summary: yahoo.co.jp exposes developer-facing HTTP APIs for Yahoo! JAPAN Web APIs, Yahoo! Shopping operations, LY Ads Search/Display Ads, and a separately documented Yahoo! News comment-scoring API; no public GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were found.
